name: Power Strike
description: Next physical attack this turn gains +2 attack value and +1 damage.

name: Hold Fast
description: Gain +2 defense value until the start of your next turn.

name: Arc Bolt
description: Deal one magic exchange to a target within 3 cells.

name: Shadowstep
description: Move up to 2 cells after finishing your Major Action.

name: Fire Sigil
description: Target player on your cell or an adjacent cell takes a magic attack and suffers Burn.

name: Ward Burst
description: Remove one debuff and gain +1 defense this turn.

name: Hook Chain
description: Pull a target from an adjacent cell onto your cell, then deal a weak physical exchange.

name: Lucky Break
description: Reroll one attack die, defense die, or event roll.

name: Sabotage
description: Gain +3 on your next raid this turn.

name: Blink Rune
description: Teleport to a visible cell within 2 steps.
